SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.identity.entity

Class OrasakaRateLimitTierEntity

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.identity.entity.OrasakaRateLimitTierEntity
@Entity public class OrasakaRateLimitTierEntity extends Object
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_rate_limit_tiers database table.

Represents a configured rate limiting tier that dictates bucket capacity, refill quotas, and timing bounds.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OrasakaRateLimitTierEntity()
    Default constructor required by JPA/Hibernate.
